templates.name: Research Experiment
templates.description: Trellis specs for research experiments: task-scoped tests/scripts/outputs, Hydra runtime, provenance, numerics, math mapping, research pitfalls, and human-agent collaboration.

templates.name: Research Experiment Scaffolder
templates.description: Optional Agent Skill for auditing or creating conservative Research-Experiment filesystem skeletons and task-slot scaffolds with dry-run/apply safety.

templates.name: Logic Chain Checker
templates.description: Read-only agent for checking coupled logic drift after core research logic changes, especially RL/ML action, objective, entropy, metric, baseline, report, and claim coupling.
